reviews.review_title: Absolute blast and well made for kids
reviews.review_description:
This is a fantastic mini game to entice kids to learn multiplication tables. It is not overstimulating and very cute. Easy to use.

To the developer: it would be an awesome if you could add the other operators (addition, subtraction, and division).  Please add them in so I don’t have to beg my kids to work with me on flash cards!

reviews.review_title: Great way to help kids learn
reviews.review_description:
Great for making learning fun. I downloaded it for my daughter and found myself really enjoying at as a way to test my own maths. 
Probably really good for helping to stay sharp. 
Menu is really easy to navigate. I like that it has a complete environment so you feel like you’re on a farm.
My suggestions to the developers would be: 
- to be able to doing other types of sums so it’s not just multiplication
- be able to enter names and have a score board to add a competitive element to it

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words!

We are working on an update to add division, addition and subtraction alongside your idea of names for multiple users on one device. Also, in the future, we will be adding more gamemodes and unlockable items.

We really appreciate the feedback!

reviews.review_description: Great free app for learning multiplication tables.
Cannot figure out how to exit the game once launched.  Keeps booting us off as well. Fun to play!

developer_response.body:
Hi Jack,

Thanks for playing our game! We are sorry that you are having this issue. The way to exit the game is just to press the Oculus button on the controller and pressing quit. Please email us at info@spatialinnovations.co.uk so that we can look into this issue for you.

Apologies for the inconvenience.

Many thanks,
Spatial Innovations

reviews.review_description: Finally an excellent game for kids that helps them learn with fun!
It really fun and it help me a lot
